title: turnera caroliniana
intro: Turnera caroliniana, also known as West Indian milkpea, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Turnera caroliniana include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
